chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 558 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 4763/2-023 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on MA 4764/2023 4.For hearing of Bail Application 21-08-2023 Mr. Ameenuddin Khaskheli, Advocate along with applicants. ****** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. Applicants, namely, Photo, Muhammad Ismail, Hidayatullah, Manthar Ali, Manzoor, Khamiso, Saleem, Raja alias Shahid, Shamsuddin and Soomar seek protective bail in Crime No.19 of 2023, registered at Police Station, Leghari-Naushahro Feroze, for offence under Sections 324, 504, 337A(i), 337F(i), 337H, 147 & 148 PPC. It is, inter-alia, contended that the applicants are innocent and have falsely been implicated in this case by the complainant; that the applicants are ready to surrender before the trial Court but apprehend their arrest at the hands of police tainted with mala fide intentions and ulterior motives. It is further stated that the Court of Sessions/Trial Court is cordoned off by the police with ulterior motives. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for period of Seven days is granted to the applicants subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (Ten thousand) each and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of aforesaid period or the date when the applicants surrender before the concerned Court, whichever occurs earlier. It is made clear that if the applicants failed to surrender before the trial Court in seven days, their bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited.

This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of aforesaid period or the date when the applicants surrender before the concerned Court, whichever occurs earlier. It is made clear that if the applicants failed to surrender before the trial Court in seven days, their bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. The bail application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
